# Project Monet

Project Monet is a website design studio for local businesses.

Website: https://www.projectmonet.space
Contact: contact@projectmonet.space
Phone: +91-8290096163

## What Project Monet does

Project Monet builds professional, mobile-friendly websites for local businesses such as dentists, restaurants, salons, clinics, gyms, real estate businesses, jewellery businesses, ecommerce businesses, coaches and other local service providers.

## Core offer

See your website before you pay.

Project Monet can create a small free homepage concept preview before a paid website project begins. The free demo is a direction preview, not a complete website, and it does not include revisions.

## Pricing

Website packages start from ₹20,000 for Indian clients and $299 for international clients. INR and USD are separate regional pricing tracks. Domain, hosting, paid tools, add-ons and maintenance are charged separately.

## Ownership

After final payment, the client owns the website, content, available code/files, domain and hosting access, and relevant platform credentials. No lock-ins. No hidden ownership. No hostage websites.

## Important sections

- Homepage: https://www.projectmonet.space/
- Work / live demos: https://www.projectmonet.space/#work
- Pricing: https://www.projectmonet.space/#pricing
- Free demo form: https://www.projectmonet.space/#demo-form

## Best summary

Project Monet helps local businesses preview a website direction before paying, then builds professional websites with clear regional pricing, optional maintenance and full ownership after final payment.
